headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，《福尔摩斯小姐3》蓄势待发
headlineEn: 'Obsession' Tops Today's Trending, 'Enola Holmes 3' on the Horizon
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：电影《痴迷》成为最热话题，《末日地堡》紧随其后。《福尔摩斯小姐3》和《穿普拉达的女王2》备受期待，本周无新片上映。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: Film 'Obsession' is the hottest topic, followed by 'Silo'. 'Enola Holmes 3' and 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' are highly anticipated. No new movies released today.

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，市场静待后续大片
industryHighlights.en: No new movies released this week, market awaits upcoming blockbusters

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档引期待
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' release date sparks anticipation

industryHighlights.text: 《权力的游戏前传：龙族》持续占据本周热搜
industryHighlights.en: 'House of the Dragon' remains in this week's trending
Upcoming films like 'The Odyssey' enter pre-release phase
